Dash_ProFeature1Desc: Offline AI (Llama) and cloud in one place.
Dash_ProFeature2Desc: Create visual workflows for the system.
Dash_ProFeature3Desc: Switch between Work, Study, and Personal.
Dash_ProFeature4Desc: Sync notes, hotkeys, and AI to the cloud.
Auth_Desc: DCC works 100% offline and free. Sign in only to unlock PRO features.
Auth_TermsPrefix: By continuing, you agree to the
Auth_LinkDesc: By linking, you can log in to your account with any of the associated providers.
Auth_ProActiveDesc: You have full access to all exclusive features.
Settings_Time4: 12 Hours with Seconds (hh:mm:ss tt) - e.g., 03:30:45 PM
Settings_ThemeDesc: The System Default theme respects High Contrast if enabled on Windows.
Settings_HotkeysDesc: Configure shortcuts that work from anywhere in Windows.
Settings_CommDesc: The base package focused on extreme productivity, running 100% offline with no account or login required.
Settings_ProDesc: Built for professionals. Includes ALL Community features, plus:
Settings_ProNotLogged: Sign In to Subscribe to PRO
Chat_Placeholder: Write your prompt here, speak to the microphone, or attach an image...
Dialog_LoginRequired_Content: You need to log into the application before proceeding with the subscription to link your profile to the license.
Dialog_ProRequired_Content_LoggedIn: The '{0}' feature is available only for PRO subscribers. Subscribe now to unlock!
Dialog_ProRequired_Content_LoggedOut: The '{0}' feature is available only for PRO subscribers. Log in and subscribe to unlock!

Updates_WU_Installing: Installing updates... This might take a while.
Updates_WU_Reboot: ✅ Installation complete. A reboot may be required.
Updates_SW_UpToDate: ✅ All software is up to date!
ChatFT_WelcomeMessage: To use ChatFT locally, you need to have Ollama installed on your machine! Or use a secret key from Gemini (Google AI Studio), Claude, or OpenAI.
Auto_ScriptPlaceholder: Paste or write your script here...
ChatFT_NoModelsMessage: No local models found. To use ChatFT, you need to download an Artificial Intelligence model. Which one do you want to download?
ChatFT_DownloadSuccess: Model downloaded successfully! You can now start chatting.
ChatFT_DownloadingMsg: Downloading model... This may take a while depending on your internet connection.
AlwaysOnTop_Desc: The Always On Top utility allows Desktop Command Center to stay pinned and always visible on top of any other Windows window. It's excellent if you want to keep notes visible while working in another software.
Auth_PageDesc: DCC works 100% offline and free. Log in only to unlock PRO features.
Auth_TxtLoading: Processing request... (if you closed the browser, click Cancel)
Auth_TermsLink: Terms of Use and Privacy Policy
Auth_PausedDesc: Your subscription is paused. Resume it in the portal to regain PRO access.
Awake_Desc: Awake is a tool inspired by PowerToys that prevents your computer from going to sleep or turning off the screen. It is useful when you are running long tasks that do not require mouse/keyboard interaction.
BugReport_Desc: Thank you for helping improve DCC! Please describe the issue you encountered with as much detail as possible.
Capture_Desc: Select below to launch the smart Windows screen capture tool and save images directly to your Clipboard.
ColorPicker_Desc: Move the mouse around the screen to capture colors from any window. Click copy to save.
ComingSoon_Subtitle: We are building this module for you.
Notes_DeleteConfirmContent: Are you sure you want to delete this note?
Oobe_Desc: Before we start, choose your preferred theme:
Oobe_Hint: You can change this later in Settings.
Prompts_EmptyDesc: Create a new prompt using the form on the right.
SystemUpdates_AutoInstallDesc: The system will check for and install updates automatically during idle times.
SystemUpdates_EmptySWMsg: Click 'Check' to look for software updates
SystemUpdates_DeepCleanDesc: Removes leftover temporary files, cache, and system folders after uninstalling.
SystemUpdates_EmptyAppsMsg: Click 'List Software' to see installed apps
Settings_HotkeyHint: Press the desired new key combination (e.g., Ctrl + Alt + P) on your keyboard. The dialog will capture the keys automatically. Press ENTER to confirm.
Settings_ProF2D: Secure login and PRO key management.
Settings_ProF4D: Process Llama 3 on your hardware. Absolute privacy.
Settings_ProF5D: Transcribe audio offline with neural networks.
Settings_ProF6D: AI types instantly as it thinks.
Settings_ProF7D: Attach screenshots and images for AI analysis.
Settings_ProF8D: Save and reuse prompts in one click.
Settings_ProF9D: Built-in store with native C# modules.
Settings_CommF1D: Mica, Glassmorphism, and native Dark Mode.
Settings_CommF2D: Pin any window above all others.
Settings_AIDesc: Set the API keys of the desired providers. Leave blank to use Ollama (Local) for free.
